### Requirements
- [ComfyUI-DaSiWa-Nodes](https://github.com/darksidewalker/ComfyUI-DaSiWa-Nodes)
- [rgthree-comfy](https://github.com/rgthree/rgthree-comfy)

### Usage
- Download your models and files
- Activate optional switches as you like
